rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF HILDA W. KLINE
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 6/12/19. No courtesy copies of the petition, the proof of service, or the original bank statements have been provided yet. Counsel contacted Examiner with a question about bank statements (indicating that the statements had not yet been filed) but did not request additional time. [LRSF 2.7 B., 14.93 G., 14.62.] Courtesy copies of the petition, the orignal bank statements, the attorney's or executor's statement about retention of the original bank statements, and proof of service (and any other pleading filed in connection with this petition) must be received by the reviewing Examiner by 6/5/19 in order to be considered for th 6/12/19 hearing.
